data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attachment support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of attachment support for prep sheets, intake forms, and maps. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the existence or functionality of such attachments. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes, but none address the attachment support requirement directly, indicating a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of attachment support (prep sheets, intake forms, maps).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the attachment support requirement.
